prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey, you've got this! This task might seem daunting right now, but you're capable of handling it. Stop letting it intimidate you - every minute you delay is just adding unnecessary stress. Take a deep breath, break it down into smaller steps, and just start. Once you begin, you'll build momentum and realize it's not as bad as you've built it up to be in your mind. You're smart, you're strong, and you can totally crush this. No more procrastinating - let's do this!
